data.headline: Sterling & Associates Real Estate
data.body: With over 30 years of experience in northern New Jersey's luxury market, Sterling & Associates delivers unmatched expertise and white-glove service for discerning buyers and sellers.

data.title: Our Services
data.subtitle: Full-service luxury real estate for buyers and sellers.

items.title: Luxury Listings
items.description: Expert marketing and staging for high-end properties in Summit, Short Hills, and Chatham.

items.title: Buyer Representation
items.description: Exclusive access to off-market properties and new developments.

items.title: Market Analysis
items.description: Data-driven pricing strategies backed by decades of local market knowledge.

data.title: Recent Sales
data.subtitle: A selection of properties sold by our team.

data.title: Client Reviews
data.subtitle: What our clients say about working with Sterling & Associates.

items.text: Victoria and her team made selling our home a seamless experience. Their market knowledge is unmatched.
James found us the perfect property in Summit. Professional, knowledgeable, and always available.

data.title: Meet Our Team
data.subtitle: Experienced agents dedicated to your success.

data.title: Get In Touch
data.subtitle: Contact Sterling & Associates for a complimentary consultation.

data.title: About Sterling & Associates
data.bio: Founded by Victoria Sterling, Sterling & Associates has been serving northern New Jersey's luxury real estate market for over 30 years. Our team of experienced agents brings deep local knowledge and a commitment to exceptional client service.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.body: A member of the Sterling & Associates team will reach out to you soon.
